content:
type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
summary: We appear to be in separate checkouts (my git diff only shows my own edits, not yours) so no literal clobbering; I kept ideal_length=min(retrieved,expected) as in original code since changing that bound is your fix, not part of graded-relevance scope, and is orthogonal to change. My patch adds relevance_scores param + rebuilds idcg from per-doc ideal relevances sorted desc, truncated to ideal_length -- your range-bound change should still apply cleanly if a human merges both diffs later
